jira_context:
[2026-01-15 09:30 - alice@redhat.com]
Requesting onboarding of simple-pkg version 2.3.x into the RHAI collection. This is a pure Python package with no native extensions. Required for the data-processing pipeline.

[2026-01-16 14:22 - bob@redhat.com]
Approved for onboarding. Please target Python 3.11+ only as we are dropping 3.10 support in Q2. License is BSD-3-Clause, already cleared by legal.

[2026-01-17 10:05 - alice@redhat.com]
Confirmed: will onboard simple-pkg 2.3.4 (latest stable) for Python 3.11+ only. No native extensions, so no platform-specific builds needed. Will submit PR this week.
